global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a prominent logo and clear call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting cashback offers with a clear subscription price.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: A stylized logo for 'VaultRun' appears prominently at the top center, featuring a modern design.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Abstract geometric shapes in light blue tones are arranged in the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Small decorative shape
elements.description: A small decorative shape located in the center, possibly a circle or square, with a light blue hue.

elements.label: Small decorative shape
elements.description: Another small decorative shape, similar to the previous one, positioned in the center area.

elements.label: Small decorative shape
elements.description: A third small decorative shape, maintaining the light blue color scheme, located in the center.

elements.label: Cashback offer
elements.description: A bold headline at the bottom center reads 'Earn cashback daily No hidden fees' in white text.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily No hidden fees

elements.label: VaultRun title
elements.description: The title 'VaultRun' is displayed in a prominent font at the top, capturing attention immediately.

elements.label: Start now button
elements.description: A call-to-action button labeled 'Start now' is positioned at the bottom center, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Subscription price
elements.description: The price '€9.99' is displayed at the bottom left in a clear, readable font, indicating the cost.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label reading 'UGC' is positioned at the top left, suggesting user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by decorative elements in the center, with the headline and CTA at the bottom.
